task: What are the Nearby Attractions from the most popular attraction in Hong Kong?
graderReasoning: The agent ultimately identified the most popular attraction in Hong Kong on us.trip.com as Hong Kong Disneyland, supported by Trip.com evidence from the Hong Kong attractions page showing it ranked first. After initial difficulty because the Nearby section was dynamically loaded, the agent used a rendered/cached Trip.com page (via r.jina.ai of the us.trip.com attraction page) that explicitly exposed the 'Nearby Attractions' list from the us.trip.com page. The final answer listed nearby attractions from that us.trip.com page, excluding the attraction itself, which is a reasonable interpretation of the user's request. This satisfies the task.
final_result_response:
Re-checked from **us.trip.com**. The most popular Hong Kong attraction is **Hong Kong Disneyland**. <citation refs="fetch_call_OhB9mn5OxkUrHANlWt6UPUGD|fc_05df4240c70946f0016a0491f2236c819a808049e3f7b47e78#1">“Hong Kong Disneyland ... 2026 Global 100 - Best Things to Do ... 󰺂10 ... 4.7/5 86,396 reviews”</citation>

Trip.com’s **Nearby Attractions** section lists these, excluding Hong Kong Disneyland itself: <citation refs="fetch_call_G4u2fI9DgjBihptMY1Cd036j|fc_05df4240c70946f0016a0491becb2c819ab9e755490cf921c9#1">“Nearby Attractions: Hong Kong Disneyland | The Peak Tram | Ocean Park Hong Kong | Victoria Peak | Hong Kong Palace Museum | Ngong Ping 360 | Hong Kong Observation Wheel | Victoria Harbour ...”</citation>

- The Peak Tram
- Ocean Park Hong Kong
- Victoria Peak
- Hong Kong Palace Museum
- Ngong Ping 360
- Hong Kong Observation Wheel
- Victoria Harbour
- Big Bus Tours Hong Kong
- M+
- Central
- Madame Tussauds Hong Kong
- Lan Kwai Fong
- The Star Ferry
- LEGOLAND Discovery Centre Hong Kong
- Hong Kong Macau Ferry Terminal
- Tsim Sha Tsui
- Lantau Island
action_history: Opening Trip.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://us.trip.com/');
Opening Trip.com again: const p2 = await openTab('https://www.trip.com/');
Opening attraction page: const p3 = await openTab('https://www.trip.com/travel-guide/attraction/hong-kong/hong-kong-disneyland-10558849?rankingId=111000000038&locale=en-XX');
Testing browser navigation: const p4 = await openTab('https://www.google.com');
Opening us.trip.com directly: const p5 = await openTab('https://us.trip.com/travel-guide/destination/hong-kong-38/');
